title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atletico de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

title: Real Betis vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
description: Real Betis have won their last four LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their second-best winning streak against the Periquitos in the competitions history, after a run of six between 1981 and 1983. Espanyol have not won any of their last six away LaLiga games against Real Betis, losing on their last two visits. The Espanyol side have not lost three consecutive away matches against Real Betis in the competition since September 1987.

title: Girona vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
description: Girona have not won any of their last four LaLiga matches against Villarreal, their worst winless run against them in the competition. Villarreal have won all five of their away LaLiga matches against Girona and could become the first team in the competitions history to win each of their first six away games against the same opponent in the top-flight.

title: Mallorca vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
description: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca have won two of their last five home games against Real Madrid CF in LaLiga, one more victory than in their previous 12 encounters on the island in the competition. Real Madrid CF have won 13 of their last 16 games against Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, scoring in the last five. The Whites have not had a longer scoring run against the Balearic side in the competition since May 2010.

title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28

Paris Saint-Germain also have the highest ratio of clean sheets in the top-flight.

title: Lille vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
description: Lille and Lens will face each other for the 122nd time in all competitions, with RCL having only played more against Monaco. Lille have beaten Lens 47 times in all competitions, their joint-most victories against a single opponent, level with Rennes. Lille have won nine of their last ten home games against Lens in Ligue 1, scoring 20 goals and conceding just five in this run, with the only exception being a 1-2 defeat in April 2022.

title: Angers SCO vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
description: Angers have lost 33 of their 64 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, more than against any other opponent in their top-flight history. Angers have conceded 120 goals against Lyon in the competition, at least 14 more than against any other team. Angers have lost 11 of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, the exception being a 3-0 home win in August 2021. Over the last eight seasons, only Paris SG and Lille have won more games against the same opponent in Ligue 1.

title: Al Rayyan vs Al Sadd - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W20
description: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

title: Tremblay vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germains 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
